narrative:
Precinct Benton (precinct in Monroe County) has 203 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.4 percentage points.
